---
title: 'I''m A Beaver'
date: '2018-02-24T00:18:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6815528780936427592'
blogger_filename: '/2018/02/im-beaver.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Personal & Spiritual Growth'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">I'm A Beaver</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><br /></span></span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Take the test: <a href="https://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/story.php?title=the-smalley-animal-personality-quiz" target="_blank">Here</a></span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;"><br /></span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;">Hope you enjoyed the Smalley Personality Quiz! Your score report is presented below. &nbsp;Your dominant personality is your highest score, but you will also notice how strong you are in the other three types. &nbsp;Your unique personality style is a combination of each type. </span></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><br /></span></span></span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><div class="m_cert_heading m_cert_heading_result" id="1" style="display: block;">
Your Result <div style="float: right;">
<stong><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" style="cursor: pointer;"><img id="printreal" src="/images/imported/www-proprofs-com/print-f508e9c334d7.png" style="display: inline;" /><img class="forqtip " id="printhov" src="/images/imported/www-proprofs-com/printhover-3d3f35a551a7.png" style="display: none;" /></a></stong>&nbsp;&nbsp;Print</div>
<br />
<div class="m_result_data" style="display: block; font-size: 13px;">

 <label><b></b></label> <br /><div class="m_rtitle" style="margin: 0px 0px 4px;">
<strong>The Beaver</strong></div>
<div class="clear">
</div>
<div class="m_rdesc" style="margin: 0px 0px 4px;">
<div style="background-image: none; border-image: none; border: currentColor; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: #595959; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Tahoma, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6em; margin-bottom: 15px;">
Strengths: Beavers have a strong need to do things right and â€œby the book.â€ In fact, theyâ€™re the kind of people who actually read instruction manuals. Theyâ€™re great at providing quality control in an office and will thrive in any situations that demand accuracy, such as accounting, engineering, etc.</div>
<div style="background-image: none; border-image: none; border: currentColor; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: #595959; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Tahoma, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6em; margin-bottom: 15px;">
Because rules, consistency, and high standards are so important to beavers, theyâ€™re often frustrated with a mate who doesnâ€™t share these same characteristics. Despite deep feelings for those they love, beavers must learn to communicate their softness and warmth in a way thatâ€™s felt and clearly understood by others.</div>
<div style="background-image: none; border-image: none; border: currentColor; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: #595959; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Tahoma, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6em; margin-bottom: 15px;">
Areas of Growth: Beavers need to accept that itâ€™s all right to make mistakes and that itâ€™s healthy to call for help when theyâ€™re struggling.</div>
</div>
<div class="clear">
</div>
<label><b></b></label> <br /><div class="m_rtitle" style="margin: 0px 0px 4px;">
<strong>The Lion</strong></div>
<div class="clear">
</div>
<div class="m_rdesc" style="margin: 0px 0px 4px;">
<div style="background-image: none; border-image: none; border: currentColor; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: #595959; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Tahoma, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6em; margin-bottom: 15px;">
Strengths: Lions are leaders. Theyâ€™re usually the bosses at work, or think they are. Theyâ€™re decisive, bottom-line folks who are not watchers or listeners. They love to solve problems. Unfortunately, if they donâ€™t learn to tone down their aggressiveness, their natural dominating traits can cause problems for others.</div>
<div style="background-image: none; border-image: none; border: currentColor; box-shadow: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: #595959; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Tahoma, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6em; margin-bottom: 15px;">
Areas of Growth: Lions need to learn that meaningful communication takes time. They need to slow down to involve others in decisions.</div>
</div>
<div class="clear">
</div>
<br />
<div class="clear">
<br /></div>
<br />
<form action="https://www.myspace.com/index.cfm?fuseaction=postto" id="myspacepostto" method="post" target="_blank">
<input name="t" type="hidden" value="My Result on The Smalley Animal Personality Quiz" /> <input name="c" type="hidden" value="&lt;div style='font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;padding:10px 0px;line-height:22px;'&gt;&lt;a href='https://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/myresult_report.php?rid=83024932&amp;title=the-smalley-animal-personality-quiz&amp;ref_id=personality&amp;shr_id=ff4ee32ef3a43cb9549073edcf433b12' &gt;My Result on The Smalley Animal Personality Quiz&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/div&gt;&lt;a href='https://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/myresult_report.php?rid=83024932&amp;title=the-smalley-animal-personality-quiz&amp;ref_id=personality&amp;shr_id=ff4ee32ef3a43cb9549073edcf433b12' &gt;&lt;img border='0' style='padding:1px;' src='' /&gt;&lt;/a&lt;br /&gt;&lt;div style='font-size:14px;line-height:20px;'&gt;.&lt;/div&gt;&lt;div style='clear:both;'&gt;&lt;/div&gt;&lt;div style='font-size:10px; font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color:#000;'&gt;&lt;a href='http://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/story.php?title=the-smalley-animal-personality-quiz' target='_blank' title='The Smalley Animal Personality Quiz'&gt;The Smalley Animal Personality Quiz&lt;/a&gt; Â» &lt;a href='http://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/' title='create e-learning' target='_blank'&gt;create e-learning&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/div&gt;" /> <input name="u" type="hidden" value="" /> <input name="l" type="hidden" value="" /> </form>
<br />
<div class="clear">
<br /></div>
<div class="clear">
<br /></div>
<div class="m_cert_heading" id="3" style="clear: both;">
Your score for each result type </div>
<div class="clear">
<br /></div>
<br /><br />
<div class="barchart_prin" id="barchart_values" style="height: 100%; margin-left: 34px; min-height: 500px; width: 90%;">
<div style="position: relative;">
<div dir="ltr" style="height: 500px; position: relative; width: 796px;">
<div aria-label="A chart." style="height: 100%; left: 0px; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%;">
<svg aria-label="A chart." height="500" style="overflow: hidden;" width="796" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs id="defs"><clippath id="_ABSTRACT_RENDERER_ID_0"><rect height="309" width="492" x="152" y="96"></rect></clippath></defs><g><rect fill-opacity="0" fill="#ffffff" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="492" x="152" y="96"><g clip-path="url(&quot;https://www.proprofs.com/quiz-school/personality/quizreport.php?title=the-smalley-animal-personality-quiz&amp;sid=ODMwMjQ5MzI=#_ABSTRACT_RENDERER_ID_0&quot;)"><g><rect fill="#cccccc" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="152" y="96"><rect fill="#cccccc" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="275" y="96"><rect fill="#cccccc" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="398" y="96"><rect fill="#cccccc" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="520" y="96"><rect fill="#cccccc" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="643" y="96"></rect></rect></rect></rect></rect></g><g><rect fill="#3366cc" height="46" stroke-width="1" stroke="#3366cc" width="408" x="153" y="112"><rect fill="#3366cc" height="46" stroke-width="1" stroke="#3366cc" width="343" x="153" y="189"><rect fill="#3366cc" height="46" stroke-width="1" stroke="#3366cc" width="220" x="153" y="266"><rect fill="#3366cc" height="46" stroke-width="1" stroke="#3366cc" width="138" x="153" y="343"></rect></rect></rect></rect></g><g><rect fill="#333333" height="309" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="1" x="152" y="96"></rect></g><g><rect fill="#999999" height="1" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="0" x="561" y="135"><rect fill="#999999" height="1" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="0" x="496" y="212"><rect fill="#999999" height="1" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="0" x="373" y="289"><rect fill="#999999" height="1" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="0" x="291" y="366"></rect></rect></rect></rect></g></g><g><g><g><text fill="#444444" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle" x="152.5" y="425.9">0</text></g><g><text fill="#444444" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle" x="275.25" y="425.9">15</text></g><g><text fill="#444444" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle" x="398" y="425.9">30</text></g><g><text fill="#444444" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle" x="520.75" y="425.9">45</text></g><g><text fill="#444444" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="middle" x="643.5" y="425.9">60</text></g><g><text fill="#222222" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="143" y="139.9">The Beaver</text></g><g><text fill="#222222" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="143" y="216.9">The Lion</text></g><g><text fill="#222222" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="143" y="293.9">The Otter</text></g><g><text fill="#222222" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="143" y="370.9">The Golden Retriever</text></g></g><g><g><g><text fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="557" y="139.9">50</text><rect fill-opacity="0" fill="#ffffff" height="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="16" x="541" y="128"></rect></g></g><g><g><text fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="492" y="216.9">42</text><rect fill-opacity="0" fill="#ffffff" height="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="16" x="476" y="205"></rect></g></g><g><g><text fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="369" y="293.9">27</text><rect fill-opacity="0" fill="#ffffff" height="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="16" x="353" y="282"></rect></g></g><g><g><text fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" text-anchor="end" x="287" y="370.9">17</text><rect fill-opacity="0" fill="#ffffff" height="14" stroke-width="0" stroke="none" width="16" x="271" y="359"></rect></g></g></g></g><g></g></rect></g></svg><div aria-label="A tabular representation of the data in the chart." style="height: 1px; left: -10000px; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; top: auto; width: 1px;">
<table><thead>
<tr><th>Element</th><th>Density</th></tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr><td>The Beaver</td><td>50</td></tr>
<tr><td>The Lion</td><td>42</td></tr>
<tr><td>The Otter</td><td>27</td></tr>
<tr><td>The Golden Retriever</td><td>17</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div aria-hidden="true" style="display: none; font-family: Arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; left: 806px; position: absolute; top: 510px; white-space: nowrap;">
17</div>
<div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<br />
<div class="clear">
<br /></div>
<div class="m_cert_heading" id="2" style="display: none;">
How You Compare To Others </div>
<br /><br />

<style>
  @media only screen and (min-width :1025px){
   #m_cert_headingtest{ margin-bottom:-20px !important;}
  
  }
  </style>
 <br /><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell
G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span><br /></div>
</div>
</span><div class="clear">
<br /></div>
</span><div class="clear">
<span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><br /></span></div>
</span><div class="clear">
<span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant |&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en" style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Multipotentialite</a></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><br /></span></span></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Tempus Sans ITC; font-size: large;"><br /></span></span></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><br /></span></span><br />
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: small;"><br /></span><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
</div>
</span><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br /><br />
<br />
<br />
<br /><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br /><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br /><br />
<br />
<br />
<br /><br />
<br /><br />
<br /><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
</div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
